scripts.lint: npm run verify:ui-tokens && npm run verify:terminal-parity && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/canister-clients && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/web && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator && npm run lint --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator-web && npm run lint:factory
scripts.lint:factory: cargo fmt --check -p factory && cargo clippy -p factory --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/canister-clients && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/web && npm run verify:public-bundle && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator && npm run build --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator-web
scripts.test:workers: npm run test --workspace betterstack-monitor-worker && npm run test --workspace strategy-discovery-proxy-worker && npm run check --workspace openrouter-proxy-worker
scripts.test: npm run test:ui-tokens && npm run test:terminal-parity && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/shared && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/canister-clients && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/indexer && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/rpc-gateway && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/web && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator && npm run test --workspace @ic-automaton/evaluator-web && npm run test:release-actions && npm run test:release-manifest && npm run test:playground-e2e && npm run test:workers
